name: AWS Bedrock Knowledge Base Cross-Account S3 Data Source Configuration Updated
description: Modifications to the S3 data source configuration of an Amazon Bedrock knowledge base can impact how data is accessed and processed. Changes might involve updates to bucket permissions, data sources, or retrieval methods, affecting the security and integrity of the knowledge base. Monitoring such updates is crucial to detect potential misconfigurations or unauthorized changes that could affect the functionality or lead to data exposure.

rules.name: AWS Bedrock Knowledge Base Cross-Account S3 Data Source Configuration Updated

author: Sunil Bharti and Yash Verma
